text.title: Regulatory Uncertainty Buffer Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: identify regulations → set thresholds → record evidence → apply buffer → quarterly review.

step.name: identify-regulations
step.input: Project scope + data flow + jurisdiction list
step.action: Run `regulation-identifier`. For each jurisdiction list applicable regulations + signals. Skip if scope clearly out-of-regime.

step.name: set-thresholds
step.action: Run `threshold-setter`. Per rule pick numeric/boolean threshold + `default_action` + `buffer_pct`. Vague signals rejected.
step.decision-gate: If any rule lacks counsel input, defer rule to next cycle.

step.name: record-evidence
step.action: For each rule attach ≥ 1 evidence anchor (transcript URL / counsel memo id / regulator letter ref).

step.name: apply-buffer
step.action: Run `apply-buffer`. For each rule firing, add `buffer_pct` to engineering hours. Sum buffers; report sponsor with rule_ids cited.

step.name: quarterly-review
step.input: Last quarter rules fired + outcomes + misses (regulator finding mid-build)
step.action: Run `outcome-review-synthesis`. Every miss triggers a new rule or threshold revision (r5-review-on-failure). Increment version.
